name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages


  coordinator = 0;       (* coordinator ID *)
  messages = <<>>;       (* list of messages in transit *)

define
  (* Message structure: [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, sender \in 1..N, receiver \in 1..N] *)

  (* Helper to send a message *)
  SendMsg(msg) == messages' = Append(messages, msg)

  (* Helper to receive a message *)
  ReceiveMsg(msg) == messages' = Tail(messages)

  (* Helper to filter messages *)
  FilterMsgs(f) == messages' = [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF f(messages[x]) THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver *)
  GetMsgs(receiver) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver *)
  RemoveMsgs(receiver) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a sender *)
  GetMsgsFrom(sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsFrom(sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages of a type *)
  GetMsgsOfType(type) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].type = type THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages of a type *)
  RemoveMsgsOfType(type) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].type = type THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeFor(receiver, type) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeFor(receiver, type) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages from a sender of a type *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeFrom(sender, type) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].sender = sender /\ messages[x].type = type THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages from a sender of a type *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeFrom(sender, type) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].sender = sender /\ messages[x].type = type THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to get messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)

  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

  (* Helper to remove messages for a receiver of a type from a sender *)
  RemoveMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[Len(messages)+1] ELSE messages[x]]

  GetMsgsOfTypeForFrom(receiver, type, sender) == [x \in 1..Len(messages) |-> IF messages[x].receiver = receiver /\ messages[x].type = type /\ messages[x].sender = sender THEN messages[x] ELSE messages[Len(messages)+1]]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "occupied", ![RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating == \A i \in 1..N :
                    /\ IsEating(i)
                    => forks[LEFT(i)] = "free" /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ LET maxNum == Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
          IN /\ num[i] = maxNum + 1
             /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                  j # i
                  => /\ flag[j] = FALSE
                     \/ /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                        /\ num[j] < num[i]
                        \/ /\ num[j] = num[i]
                            /\ j < i
             /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
